MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (via Zoom):

Allison Strull; Utrecht & Lenvin LLP; 415-357-0600; appearing on behalf of plaintiffs Sansome-Potrero LLC, Emmet Brendan Ward, et al.

No other appearances. Ms. Strull appears to notify the court that this matter has settled, and to confirm that the court received her letter requesting that this motion be taken off calendar. The court confirms that the letter was received and rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFS SANSOME-POTRERO LLC, EMMET WARD, LORRAINE WARD, THOMAS MURPHY AND MARTINA MURPHY'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER is off calendar per request of the moving party.
